# PHIL.098 ? Effective Altruism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** specialized_interdisciplinary
**Subcategory:** effective_altruism

**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Maximize good through reason and evidence; cause prioritization; expected value; earning to give; long-termism

## Application
Evidence-based giving; cause prioritization; expected value calculation; maximize impact; rational altruism; long-term thinking

## Key Values
- Evidence-based good
- Maximization
- Rationality
- Effectiveness
